---
title: '2014/03/28 Email From and To Olivier Simon'
date: '2014-03-29T03:47:00.0040000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '7809905730881879524'
blogger_filename: '/2014/03/20140328-email-from-and-to-olivier-simon.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Revelation'
  - 'Word From God'
---

<div style="font-family: arial; font-size: small;">
<span style="color: black;"><span style="font-family: georgia,serif;">Olivier,</span></span></div>
<div style="font-family: arial; font-size: small;">
<span style="color: black;"><span style="font-family: georgia,serif;"><br /></span></span></div>
<div style="font-family: arial; font-size: small;">
<span style="color: black;"><span style="font-family: georgia,serif;">Wow!&nbsp;</span></span></div>
<div style="font-family: arial; font-size: small;">
<span style="color: black;"><span style="font-family: georgia,serif;"><br /></span></span></div>
<div style="font-family: arial; font-size: small;">
<span style="color: black;"><span style="font-family: georgia,serif;">That's a story to tell the kids when they get older! I look forward to hearing how this progresses.&nbsp;</span></span></div>
<div style="font-family: arial; font-size: small;">
<span style="color: black;"><span style="font-family: georgia,serif;"><br /></span></span></div>
<div style="font-family: arial; font-size: small;">
<span style="color: black;"><span style="font-family: georgia,serif;">Well. Let's see.&nbsp;</span></span></div>
<div style="font-family: arial; font-size: small;">
<span style="color: black;"><span style="font-family: georgia,serif;"><br /></span></span></div>
<div style="font-family: arial; font-size: small;">
<ul>
<li><span style="font-family: georgia, serif;">I"m plugging away at my new blog address: www.DarrellWolfe.Com</span></li>
<li><span style="font-family: georgia, serif;">Playing with writing fiction, no specific book I'm working on right now, just getting into the&nbsp;habit&nbsp;of writing more fiction.&nbsp;http://authorfun.blogspot.com</span></li>
<li><span style="font-family: georgia, serif;">Flavia is starting to do more art:&nbsp;http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com</span></li>
<li><span style="font-family: georgia, serif;">I still work at Wells Fargo, but I'm&nbsp;believing&nbsp;for that to change in the next 30 days.&nbsp;</span></li>
<li><span style="font-family: georgia, serif;">I got an Acoustic Guitar and started playing again, just for me and God.&nbsp;</span></li>
<li><span style="font-family: georgia, serif;">Kids are getting older, both still Home Schooled.&nbsp;</span></li>
<li><span style="font-family: georgia, serif;">Connor is going to Camp BY HIMSELF in June. The first time he's been away from both of us more than one night.&nbsp;</span></li>
<li><span style="font-family: georgia, serif;">I'm going to Gateway Church,&nbsp;</span><span style="font-family: georgia, serif;">They have this TOTALLY awesome series called "Freedom Ministry" and it's been life changing for me. You can even watch it on their website, but you can't download it, which means I can only watch it on my computer, but maybe that's ok. It&nbsp;forces</span><span style="font-family: georgia, serif;">&nbsp;me to be still. They also have live classes when I wake up early enough to go to 9 AM services! http://gatewaypeople.com/ministries/freedom-kairos/media1 TOTALLY awesome place.&nbsp;</span></li>
</ul>
<div>
<span style="font-family: georgia, serif;">As for the future? I'm a little lost. I want to be a self employed blogger (Internet Business Person) full time by the end of 2015.&nbsp;</span></div>
<div>
<span style="font-family: georgia, serif;"><br /></span></div>
<div>
<span style="font-family: georgia, serif;">We've been talking a lot about moving to Idaho in the future, don't know when. We feel our time in Texas is drawing to a close... or maybe we keep property here and get some there too. Maybe it's more like expanding our reach vs leaving one for the other?&nbsp;</span></div>
</div>
<div style="font-family: arial; font-size: small;">
<span style="font-family: georgia, serif;"><br /></span></div>
<div style="font-family: arial; font-size: small;">
<span style="font-family: georgia, serif;">Honestly I've been struggling a lot with Depression on and off this past year, which is something I struggled with all my childhood. I think it's been there all along, like a weight keeping me back from really growing. I think it's more of a struggle now for two reasons.&nbsp;</span></div>
<div style="font-family: arial; font-size: small;">
<span style="font-family: georgia, serif;"><br /></span></div>
<div style="font-family: arial; font-size: small;">
<span style="font-family: georgia, serif;">1. I stopped struggling and just accepted it as life for a long time. Now that I'm starting the journey to overcoming it's actually a struggle because of the&nbsp;resistance. I've been getting prayer and counsel for it&nbsp;from close spiritual headship.&nbsp;</span></div>
<div style="font-family: arial; font-size: small;">
<span style="font-family: georgia, serif;"><br /></span></div>
<div style="font-family: arial; font-size: small;">
<span style="font-family: georgia, serif;">2. At Gateway I'm now in a place I feel free to&nbsp;admit&nbsp;it. In places I've been in the past I didn't feel free, I felt like I had to try to become "Super Christian". That's not just in Word of Faith churches, that's all my life. Going back to when I was a pastor's kid in the mainline denominations. I think God has used Gateway's atmosphere of openness and healing to start that healing process, I've just been fighting it some. As I let him, he's been changing me.&nbsp;</span></div>
<div style="font-family: arial; font-size: small;">
<span style="font-family: georgia, serif;"><br /></span></div>
<div style="font-family: arial; font-size: small;">
<span style="font-family: georgia, serif;">I've let many of my other dreams and aspiration die. Not in the bad way of giving up. But in the good way of "Stop trying to MAKE something happen and lay it on the alter of God." sort of die. Seed can't become a tree unless it dies. That sort of thing.</span></div>
<div style="font-family: arial; font-size: small;">
<span style="font-family: georgia, serif;"><br /></span></div>
<div style="font-family: arial; font-size: small;">
<span style="font-family: georgia, serif;">Therefore, I've stopped "trying to be" and started to allow Him to mold me. It's messy and uncomfortable to give up control. I'm not changing as fast as Flavia would like, or needs me to, I'm still resisting much of the change. But I was reminded again today as I listened to Keith Moore that I need to let God in to do the work I cannot do.&nbsp;</span></div>
<div>
<span style="color: black;"><span style="font-family: georgia,serif;"><br /></span></span></div>
<div>
<span style="color: black;"><span style="font-family: georgia,serif;">I was born with a high IQ. Last tested in College it was 148 IQ. I can do nearly anything I want, learn anything I try to learn. I'm SO "Self Sufficient" that I think God's had to bring me to the end of myself in order to see how much I need Him to function. Some of this is just coming to me as I write it, so I'll probably copy this email into my journal.&nbsp;</span></span></div>
<div>
<span style="color: black;"><span style="font-family: georgia,serif;"><br /></span></span></div>
<div>
<span style="color: black;"><span style="font-family: georgia,serif;">OH, That's&nbsp;another&nbsp;thing. I keep a journal on a blog, but I put the settings to private so only I can read it. It's been a freeing part of my day. I do it EVERY morning, almost&nbsp;religiously. I try to keep it informal and quick. It's really helped me to sort thoughts for myself and process in a way that keeping them floating around up there doesn't.&nbsp;</span></span></div>
<div>
<span style="color: black;"><span style="font-family: georgia,serif;"><br /></span></span></div>
<div>
<span style="color: black;"><span style="font-family: georgia,serif;">I think that's about it for me right now. It's going to be an interesting year! DW</span></span></div>
<span style="color: black; font-family: arial; font-size: x-small;"><span style="font-family: georgia,serif;"><br /></span></span><br />
<div class="gmail_quote" style="font-family: arial; font-size: small;">
On Thu, Mar 27, 2014 at 11:57 PM, olivier simon&nbsp;<span dir="ltr">&lt;<a href="mailto:ojegssimon@gmail.com" target="_blank">ojegssimon@gmail.com</a>&gt;</span>&nbsp;wrote:<br /><blockquote class="gmail_quote" style="border-left-color: rgb(204, 204, 204); border-left-style: solid; border-left-width: 1px; margin: 0px 0px 0px 0.8ex; padding-left: 1ex;">
<div style="word-wrap: break-word;">
yeah, you will be wealthy enough :)<div>
well, I've always known that I was going to be in the ministry not because I'm good at anything because it's actually the opposite. If I look at my own skills, I have a few reasons to doubt myself. I still have not stood in front of a public, the church to teach anything (the moment is approaching fast since I already have to share with the group about how to minister one on one when we go out to evangelize).&nbsp;</div>
<div>
Anyway, did it come as a surprise? Well, it's funny that you asked because Pastor said that he was about to shock me and the word was very accurate because when he called both my beauty and I to walk up to him as he wanted to lay hands on us, he said about me pastoring in France that, "You have not seen it but she (my beauty) has and she's told you about it but you say 'nah, nah, nah'....Am I right (he asked my beauty)?" and she nodded.</div>
<div>
Yeah, not in a million years did I ever think I was going to go back to France. I could envision going to minister (as a teacher) on a short trip but surely not to open a church. Definitely and emphatically, no! Yet my beauty has always had in her heart or saw that one day I would be in France ministering but had not really shared that with me that I can recall but she's surely, over the years, told me about writing books :)&nbsp;</div>
<div>
Well, pretty accurate word as you can see.</div>
<div>
Yep, don't know how long it'll take but Pastor Art, Joann and my family are supposed to go to Paris this year...</div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
Enough about me. What about you? what's cooking?</div>
<div>
<br /><div>
<span style="border-collapse: separate; font-family: Helvetica;"><div>
"But without faith it is impossible to please Him [God], for he who comes to God must believe that He is, and that He is a rewarder of those who diligently seek Him."</div>
<div>
Hebrews 11.6</div>
<div>
<br /></div>
</span></div>
<br /><div>
<div>
On Mar 27, 2014, at 11:27 AM, Darrell Wolfe &lt;<a href="mailto:darrellwolfe@gmail.com" target="_blank">darrellwolfe@gmail.com</a>&gt; wrote:</div>
<br /><blockquote type="cite">
<span style="font-family: georgia,serif;">That's a heavy Word of the Lord. Of course you've made that big physical move before. But now going back as an&nbsp;American&nbsp;citizen&nbsp;you'll have a different perspective than you had before. And now you're going to go back as a Pastor! I could totally see that happening! It'll make it hard to visit, I guess I'll just have to get wealthier! LOL.&nbsp;</span><div>
<span style="font-family: georgia, serif;"><br /></span></div>
<div>
<span style="font-family: georgia, serif;">I assume there is no timing on that. Could be three days or three years from now. But that's cool. Honestly I kind of wondered if that would happen. But it was just a passing thought so I don't think I ever mentioned it. I've heard so much about the need for Faith filled believers in France (and Europe in general). I know things are different there.&nbsp;</span></div>
<div>
<span style="font-family: georgia, serif;"><br /></span></div>
<div>
<span style="font-family: georgia, serif;">So had this been on your heart before the Word came? Even as a seed?&nbsp;</span></div>
<div>
<span style="font-family: georgia, serif;"><br /></span></div>
<div>
<span style="font-family: georgia, serif;">D</span><div>
<span style="font-family: georgia,serif;"><br /></span></div>
<div>
<span style="font-family: georgia,serif;"><br /></span></div>
<div>
<span style="font-family: georgia,serif;"><br /></span><br /><div class="gmail_quote">
On Wed, Mar 26, 2014 at 11:56 PM, olivier simon&nbsp;<span dir="ltr">&lt;<a href="mailto:ojegssimon@gmail.com" target="_blank">ojegssimon@gmail.com</a>&gt;</span>&nbsp;wrote:<br /><blockquote class="gmail_quote" style="border-left-color: rgb(204, 204, 204); border-left-style: solid; border-left-width: 1px; margin: 0px 0px 0px 0.8ex; padding-left: 1ex;">
Hi,<br />I'm not going to be long. Just wanted to say a quick hello. I believe I owe you a text or an email or an answer about what's going on with me. Well, I'm going to make this quick because my Beauty is about to get home and I'm not done studying but well, things are developing and I'm entering a new phase in my life. The word of the Lord came to me through our pastor a few months ago and revealed to me that Paris France is about to call me, urging me to come just like the Macedonian call and that when the time is right, I will go back to Paris and open a church....This came as a shock to me and I'm still taking a deep breath as I'm writing this to you.<br />I don't know the timing but the obvious is that things have been speeding up.<br />I'm obviously humbled by all this but...one day at a time.<br />I'm currently leading a group in our church to go and feed the homeless while sharing God's love for them. We do that on the last Sunday of the month at 9am right before going to church. We go to La Palma park.<br />Hey, I love you man! I miss you a bit Lol!!<br />Stay blessed because you are!<br />Amen!<br /><br />"Behold the proud, his soul is not upright in him; but the just shall live by faith."<br />Habakkuk 2.4<br /><br /><br /><br /></blockquote>
</div>
<br /><br clear="all" /><div>
<br /></div>
--<br /><div dir="ltr">
<br /><div>
</div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<div style="margin-bottom: 0pt; text-indent: 0.5in;">
<span style="font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: large;">Darrell G. Wolfe</span></span></div>
<div style="margin-bottom: 0pt;">
<span style="font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span><span style="font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;">Blogger,&nbsp;<span style="font-family: 'Trebuchet MS'; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;">Author</span></span>,&nbsp;</span><span style="font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;"><wbr></wbr>Audio Mixer, Musician, Etc.</span></div>
<span style="color: grey; font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="color: blue;"><span style="color: #0072bc;"><div style="font-family: 'Trebuchet MS'; font-size: 12pt;">
<div style="margin-bottom: 0pt; text-indent: 0.5in;">
<span style="color: grey; font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="color: blue;"><br /></span></span></div>
<div style="margin-bottom: 0pt; text-indent: 0.5in;">
<span style="color: grey; font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="color: blue;"><span style="color: #0072bc;"><a href="http://darrellwolfe.blogspot.com/" target="_blank">DarrellWolfe.blogspot.com</a></span></span></span></div>
<div style="margin-bottom: 0pt; text-indent: 0.5in;">
<span style="color: grey; font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="color: blue;"></span></span><span style="color: grey; font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="color: #0072bc;"><span style="color: grey; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="color: blue;"><span style="color: #0072bc;"><a href="http://authorfun.blogspot.com/" target="_blank">AuthorFun.blogspot.com</a></span></span></span></span></span></div>
<div style="margin-bottom: 0pt; text-indent: 0.5in;">
<span style="color: grey; font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="color: #0072bc;"><span style="color: grey; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="color: blue;"><span style="color: #0072bc;"><a href="http://texaslivinginfo.blogspot.com/" target="_blank">TexasLivingInfo.Blogspot.com</a></span></span></span></span></span></div>
<div style="margin-bottom: 0pt; text-indent: 0.5in;">
<span style="color: grey; font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="color: #0072bc;"><span style="color: grey; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="color: blue;"></span></span><span style="color: grey; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="color: blue;"></span></span></span></span><span style="color: grey; font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;"><a href="https://twitter.com/DarrellWolfe" target="_blank"><span style="color: #0072bc;">Twitter: @DarrellWolfe</span></a><a href="http://darrellwolfe.blogspot.com/" target="_blank"></a></span></div>
<a href="http://darrellwolfe.blogspot.com/" target="_blank"></a><div style="margin-bottom: 0pt; text-indent: 0.5in;">
<a href="http://darrellwolfe.blogspot.com/" target="_blank"><span style="color: grey; font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;"></span></a><a href="mailto:DarrellGWolfe@gmail.com" target="_blank"><span style="color: blue;"><span style="color: #0072bc;">DarrellGWolfe@gmail.com</span></span></a></div>
</div>
</span></span></span></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<img src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/email-signature-b8f38f5e2122.jpg" /></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</blockquote>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</blockquote>
</div>
<br style="font-family: arial; font-size: small;" /><br />
<div style="font-family: arial; font-size: small;">
<br /></div>
<span style="font-family: arial; font-size: x-small;">--&nbsp;</span><br />
<div dir="ltr" style="font-family: arial; font-size: small;">
<br /><div>
</div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<div style="margin-bottom: 0pt; text-indent: 0.5in;">
<span style="font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: large;">Darrell G. Wolfe</span></span></div>
<div style="margin-bottom: 0pt;">
<span style="font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span><span style="font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;">Blogger,&nbsp;<span style="font-family: 'Trebuchet MS'; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;">Author</span></span>,&nbsp;</span><span style="font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;">Audio Mixer, Musician, Etc.</span></div>
<span style="color: grey; font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="color: blue;"><span style="color: #0072bc;"><div style="font-family: 'Trebuchet MS'; font-size: 12pt;">
<div style="margin-bottom: 0pt; text-indent: 0.5in;">
<span style="color: grey; font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="color: blue;"><br /></span></span></div>
<div style="margin-bottom: 0pt; text-indent: 0.5in;">
<span style="color: grey; font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="color: blue;"><span style="color: #0072bc;"><a href="http://darrellwolfe.blogspot.com/" target="_blank">DarrellWolfe.blogspot.com</a></span></span></span></div>
<div style="margin-bottom: 0pt; text-indent: 0.5in;">
<span style="color: grey; font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="color: blue;"></span></span><span style="color: grey; font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="color: #0072bc;"><span style="color: grey; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="color: blue;"><span style="color: #0072bc;"><a href="http://authorfun.blogspot.com/" target="_blank">AuthorFun.blogspot.com</a></span></span></span></span></span></div>
<div style="margin-bottom: 0pt; text-indent: 0.5in;">
<span style="color: grey; font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="color: #0072bc;"><span style="color: grey; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="color: blue;"><span style="color: #0072bc;"><a href="http://texaslivinginfo.blogspot.com/" target="_blank">TexasLivingInfo.Blogspot.com</a></span></span></span></span></span></div>
<div style="margin-bottom: 0pt; text-indent: 0.5in;">
<span style="color: grey; font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="color: #0072bc;"><span style="color: grey; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="color: blue;"></span></span><span style="color: grey; font-size: 12pt;"><span style="color: blue;"></span></span></span></span><span style="color: grey; font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;"><a href="https://twitter.com/DarrellWolfe" target="_blank"><span style="color: #0072bc;">Twitter: @DarrellWolfe</span></a><a href="http://darrellwolfe.blogspot.com/" target="_blank"></a></span></div>
<a href="http://darrellwolfe.blogspot.com/" target="_blank"></a><div style="margin-bottom: 0pt; text-indent: 0.5in;">
<a href="http://darrellwolfe.blogspot.com/" target="_blank"><span style="color: grey; font-family: 'Tempus Sans ITC'; font-size: 12pt;"></span></a><a href="mailto:DarrellGWolfe@gmail.com" target="_blank"><span style="color: blue;"><span style="color: #0072bc;">DarrellGWolfe@gmail.com</span></span></a></div>
</div>
</span></span></span></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<img src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/email-signature-b8f38f5e2122.jpg" /></div>
</div>
